Tool Output: // MAIN ENTRY POINT - Cyberpunk RPG: Dunoon 2056
// A story of hackers, survival, and hope in the margins

main:
    run initVariables
    run transition_instant title_screen
    jump pre_intro

pre_intro:
    clear_dialog
    "2056. The Cape Town coast."
    clear_dialog
    "Between the vineyards of the wealthy and the endless stretch of ocean lies Dunoon."
    clear_dialog
    "A squatter camp. A township. Home to those the new South Africa forgot."
    clear_dialog
    "You wake with blood in your mouth and fire in your skull."
    clear_dialog
    jump intro_start

initVariables:
    // TIME MECHANIC - 100 hours to live
    set data.time.hoursRemaining 100
    set data.time.daysPassed 0
    set data.time.totalActions 0
    
    // PLAYER STATE
    set data.player.name "Stranger"
    set data.player.gender unknown
    set data.player.ancestry unknown
    set data.player.hasNeuralImplant true
    set data.player.implantDamaged true
    set data.player.knowsIdentity false
    set data.player.memoriesRecovered 0
    
    // INTRO FLAGS
    set data.intro.wokeUp false
    set data.intro.metVoices false
    set data.intro.lookedAround false
    set data.intro.checkedBody false
    set data.intro.checkedImplant false
    set data.intro.leftShack false
    
    // IDENTITY CHOICES
    set data.identity.chosenGender false
    set data.identity.chosenAncestry false
    
    // QUEST TRACKING
    set data.quests.mainQuestStarted false
    set data.quests.sideQuestsStarted 0
    set data.quests.knowAboutSilas false
    set data.quests.knowAboutImplant false

    // WORLD STATE
    set data.world.weather "clear"
    set data.world.timeOfDay "morning"
    set data.world.dangerLevel 1
    
    // SKILL LEVELS (start at base, modified by choices)
    set data.skills.hacker 1
    set data.skills.survivor 1
    set data.skills.ancestor 1
    
    // INVENTORY FLAGS
    set data.inventory.hasDeck false
    set data.inventory.hasCredchip false
    set data.inventory.hasWeapon false
    set data.inventory.credits 0
    
    // RELATIONSHIPS
    set data.relationships.mamaNomi 0
    set data.relationships.tango 0
    set data.relationships.silas 0
    set data.relationships.netrunnerCollective 0
    set data.relationships.ariesCorp 0
    
    // HOME SHACK FLAGS
    set data.home.examinedPhoto false
    set data.home.searched false
    set data.home.thoroughlySearched false
    set data.home.implantAttempt false
    set data.home.deckDiag false
    set data.home.browsedNet false
    set data.home.foundCompartment false
    set data.home.checkedCompartment false
    set data.home.talkedToVoices false
    set data.home.voicesHarmonized false
    set data.home.deckFound false
    set data.home.knowMother false
    set data.home.knowLoss false
    set data.home.rememberedLove false
    set data.home.rememberedCreation false
    set data.home.rememberedEnemy true
    set data.home.implantFocus false
    
    // MAMA NOMI FLAGS
    set data.mamaNomi.met false
    set data.mamaNomi.talked false
    set data.mamaNomi.usedTerminal false
    set data.mamaNomi.askedAboutTango false
    
    // TANGO FLAGS

    set data.tango.stabilized false
    set data.tango.askedAboutCollective false
    
    // SILAS FLAGS
    set data.lot.metSilas false
    
    // NET CAFE FLAGS
    set data.netCafe.talkedToOwner false
    set data.netCafe.wasHereBefore false
    
    // CLINIC FLAGS

    // MARKET FLAGS
    set data.market.lookedForInfo false
    set data.market.foundFence false
    set data.market.talkedToKids false

    // GAME MAP STATE
    set data.game_map.inMap false
    set data.game_map.inPrompts false
    set data.game_map.currentLocation "none"
    
    // ENDING FLAGS
    set data.ending.sacrifice false

// DEBUG FUNCTIONS
debug_skip_to_map:
    run initVariables
    set data.intro.wokeUp true
    set data.intro.metVoices true
    set data.intro.lookedAround true
    set data.intro.checkedBody true
    set data.intro.checkedImplant true
    set data.player.knowsIdentity true
    set_stat hours 100
    start_quest main_story
    jump game_map

debug_add_items:
    add_item neural_deck 1
    add_item credchip 1
    add_item shiv 1
    set data.inventory.credits 50

debug_set_time:

Tool Output: // INTRO SEQUENCE - Dunoon 2056 // The player wakes up with amnesia and discovers their condition intro_start: play music ambient_dunoon play ambient amb_township 1 clear_dialog "SYSTEM ERROR. NEURAL ARCHIVE CORRUPTED. MEMORY SECTORS: OFFLINE." clear_dialog "TIME TO TOTAL CASCADE FAILURE: 100 HOURS." clear_dialog "RECOMMENDATION: SEEK IMMEDIATE MEDICAL ATTENTION." clear_dialog "RECOMMENDATION: FIND OUT WHO YOU ARE BEFORE YOU DIE." clear_dialog run transition_instant shack_interior "Pain. White hot. Blinding." clear_dialog "Your eyes snap open to a ceiling of corrugated iron, rust-stained and leaking thin beams of dusty light." clear_dialog "Someone is screaming. It takes you a moment to realize it's coming from inside your head." clear_dialog set data.intro.wokeUp true jump intro_wake_choices intro_wake_choices: clear_dialog choice: "Your skull feels like it's been cracked open and stitched back together with copper wire. Every thought sends lightning bolts through your synapses." "[Try to remember something, anything]" if (!= $data.intro.triedRemember true): set data.intro.triedRemember true jump intro_try_remember "[Check your body]" if (!= $data.intro.checkedBody true): set data.intro.checkedBody true jump intro_check_body "[Listen to the screaming in your head]" if (!= $data.intro.metVoices true): set data.intro.metVoices true jump intro_meet_voices "[Look around the shack]" if (!= $data.intro.lookedAround true): set data.intro.lookedAround true jump intro_look_around "[Try to stand]" if (&& $data.intro.checkedBody $data.intro.metVoices $data.intro.lookedAround): jump intro_stand_up intro_try_remember: "You close your eyes and reach for something—a name, a face, a place that means something." clear_dialog "Nothing. Static. A corrupted data stream where your life should be." clear_dialog "Fragments flicker at the edges:" clear_dialog "The smell of roasting corn. Hands moving across a keyboard. A woman's laughter. Gunfire. The taste of dust." clear_dialog "But they're just fragments. Sensory ghosts. They slip away like water through your fingers." clear_dialog talk hacker internal "Memory's gone. wiped. But the skills are still here. Muscle memory doesn't need a name." clear_dialog jump intro_wake_choices intro_check_body: "You take stock of yourself." clear_dialog "You're lying on a thin mattress on the floor. Your clothes are simple, worn—a t-shirt, cargo pants, boots that have seen better days." clear_dialog "Your hands... they're dark-skinned, calloused. The fingers are long, precise. Worker's hands. Or..." clear_dialog talk hacker internal "Hacker's hands. Look at those fine motor skills. You've spent years at a deck." clear_dialog "There's a scar running up your left forearm, old and healed. A tattoo on your right bicep—numbers, a date maybe, partially obscured by burn marks." clear_dialog "At the base of your skull, beneath your hairline, you feel a slight raised area. A neural implant port." clear_dialog "And it's hot. Too hot. Something's wrong with it." clear_dialog talk survivor internal "That implant is killing you. Slowly. You've got time, but not forever. That much is clear." clear_dialog jump intro_wake_choices intro_meet_voices: "The screaming resolves into voices. Three of them, distinct, arguing inside your skull." clear_dialog talk survivor internal "—telling you, we need to move. Assess. Survive. We don't have time for—" clear_dialog talk hacker internal "—need to check the implant first! That's our only way out of this, our only way to understand what happened—" clear_dialog talk ancestor internal "Peace. Peace, both of you. The body is confused. The spirit is fragmented. We must be gentle." clear_dialog "They fall silent as you acknowledge them. You can feel them now—three presences coiled in different parts of your mind." clear_dialog "One is sharp, electric, constantly calculating. It sees patterns in everything." clear_dialog "One is wary, watchful, always scanning for threats and exits. It remembers pain and how to avoid it." clear_dialog "One is old, patient, carrying the weight of generations. It speaks in proverbs and intuition." clear_dialog choice: "These are your voices. Your skills. Your fragmented self." "[Acknowledge the Hacker]": talk hacker internal "I'm your edge. Your technical knowledge. I know code, systems, the architecture of the Net. Whatever happened to us, the answers are in that implant." add_level hacker 1 "[Acknowledge the Survivor]": talk survivor internal "I'm your instincts. Your street smarts. I know how to read people, how to find food and shelter, how to stay alive when everything wants you dead." add_level survivor 1 "[Acknowledge the Ancestor]": talk ancestor internal "I am your memory of memory. The wisdom of those who came before. I carry what your people have always known—that survival is collective, that we are more than our suffering." add_level ancestor 1 clear_dialog jump intro_wake_choices intro_look_around: "You force yourself to sit up, head spinning, and take in your surroundings." clear_dialog "You're in a shack. Maybe three meters by four. Walls of corrugated iron, wood scraps, and plastic sheeting. A roof that leaks." clear_dialog "This is someone's home. Maybe yours? There are signs of habitation—a camp stove, a bucket of water, a few cans of food, a sleeping roll." clear_dialog "In one corner, half-hidden under a tarp: a battered neural deck. Old model, but functional. A lifeline for someone who hacks for a living." clear_dialog "On the wall, a faded photograph of a woman. Middle-aged, kind-faced, wearing the bright patterns of West African cloth. Someone's mother, maybe." clear_dialog if (roll intro_look_ancestor ancestor 30): talk ancestor internal "She looks like home. Whoever she is, she matters. Remember her face." clear_dialog "A single window, cracked and dirty, looks out over a maze of similar shacks stretching toward the distant glitter of skyscrapers." clear_dialog "Somewhere beyond those towers is the ocean. Here, there is only dust and poverty and the endless struggle to exist." clear_dialog jump intro_wake_choices intro_stand_up: play sound clothing "You stand. Your legs are shaky but they hold." clear_dialog "The voices in your head settle into a watchful silence." clear_dialog talk survivor internal "We need information. Who we are. Why someone wanted us dead. How much time we have left." clear_dialog talk hacker internal "The implant. It's dying, and it's taking us with it. We need to fix it or extract the data before it fails completely." clear_dialog talk ancestor internal "And we need community. No one survives alone. There are people out there who knew us, who might help us. We must find them." clear_dialog "One hundred hours. That's what the error message said. One hundred hours to find out who you are, what happened to you, and how to survive." clear_dialog choice: "The countdown has begun." "[Step outside] [[BEGIN]]": play sound door_creak set data.intro.leftShack true start_quest main_story jump intro_first_outside intro_first_outside: stop ambient 1 play ambient amb_township_day 1 run transition shack_exterior "The air hits you like a wall—heat, dust, the smell of cooking fires and unwashed bodies and something chemical from the distant industrial zone." clear_dialog "Dunoon stretches before you, a labyrinth of shacks and makeshift structures clinging to existence between the wine farms and the sea." clear_dialog "In the distance, the gleaming towers of Cape Town's wealthy suburbs catch the morning light. A different world. A different planet, almost." clear_dialog "Closer, you can see people beginning their day—women heading to work, children in threadbare uniforms walking to school, old men sitting on crates and watching everything with knowing eyes." clear_dialog "You are one of them. You are a ghost in your own life. And somewhere in this maze of poverty and survival is the key to who you are." clear_dialog "A sign on a nearby post, hand-painted: "MAMA NOMI'S PLACE - HOT FOOD - COLD DRINKS - NETWORK ACCESS"" clear_dialog talk survivor internal "Network access. That's our first stop. We need to find out what's on that implant." clear_dialog jump intro_identity_choice intro_identity_choice: clear_dialog "Before you move forward, you catch a glimpse of yourself in a broken mirror someone has hung on their wall." clear_dialog "Who do you see?" clear_dialog choice: "You see..." "A young man with sharp features and close-cropped hair.": set data.player.gender "man" set data.identity.chosenGender true "You see a young black man, maybe early twenties. Your features are sharp, angular—could be Malawian, could be Zimbabwean. Your eyes are hard, like you've seen too much." jump intro_ancestry_choice "A masculine woman with braided hair and a hard jaw.": set data.player.gender "woman" set data.identity.chosenGender true "You see a young black woman, maybe early twenties. Your features are strong, masculine—your hair is braided close to your skull. Your eyes are hard, like you've seen too much." jump intro_ancestry_choice intro_ancestry_choice: clear_dialog "There's something in your face that speaks of elsewhere. Your family came from..." clear_dialog choice: "Your ancestors came from..." "Malawi. The warm heart of Africa.": set data.player.ancestry "malawian" set data.identity.chosenAncestry true "Malawi. You don't remember your family, but something in you knows the word, feels the connection to the lake and the warm heart of a land far from here." add_level ancestor 1 "Nigeria. The giant of Africa.": set data.player.ancestry "nigerian" set data.identity.chosenAncestry true "Nigeria. You don't remember your family, but something in you knows the word, feels the connection to the delta and the giant of a land far from here." add_level ancestor 1 "Mozambique. The land of smiles.": set data.player.ancestry "mozambican" set data.identity.chosenAncestry true "Mozambique. You don't remember your family, but something in you knows the word, feels the connection to the coast and the land of smiles far from here." add_level ancestor 1 "Zimbabwe. The house of stone.": set data.player.ancestry "zimbabwean" set data.identity.chosenAncestry true "Zimbabwe. You don't remember your family, but something in you knows the word, feels the connection to the great stone ruins and the house of stone far from here." add_level ancestor 1 clear_dialog talk ancestor internal "Wherever we came from, we are here now. And we will survive." clear_dialog set data.player.knowsIdentity true jump intro_end intro_end: clear_dialog "100 hours. That's your countdown. Your death sentence, or your motivation." clear_dialog "Somewhere in this township is the truth. Somewhere in your broken implant is your past. Somewhere in this world is a future worth fighting for." clear_dialog "The sun is rising over Dunoon. Time to get to work." clear_dialog run transition_black game_map jump game_map

Tool Output: // HOME SHACK - Player's home location // Detailed interactions, memories, and personal discovery home_shack_entry: run transition shack_interior set data.game_map.inMap false set data.game_map.currentLocation "home" // Ambient description based on time if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 75): "Morning light filters through the cracks in your shack's walls. The air is cool, almost pleasant." elseif (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 50): "The afternoon heat is building. Your shack is stifling." elseif (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 25): "Evening shadows stretch across your shack. The light is golden, almost beautiful." else: "Night has fallen. Your shack is dark, lit only by the faint glow of your dying implant." clear_dialog jump home_shack_main home_shack_main: clear_dialog run hours_display clear_dialog choice: "Your shack. Your refuge. What do you do?" // REST OPTIONS "[Rest] - Sleep for a few hours (Cost: 3 hours)" if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 5): run spend_hours 3 jump home_shack_rest "[Deep rest] - Sleep through the night (Cost: 8 hours)" if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 12): run spend_hours 8 jump home_shack_deep_rest // MEMORY RECOVERY "[Meditate] - Try to recover memories (Cost: 5 hours)" if (>= $data.time.hoursRemaining 8): run spend_hours 5 jump home_shack_meditate // INVENTORY/ITEMS "[Check your belongings]": jump home_shack_inventory "[Examine the neural deck]" if (has_item? neural_deck): jump home_shack_deck "[Look at the photograph]" if (!= $data.home.examinedPhoto true): jump home_shack_photo // ENVIRONMENT "[Search the shack thoroughly]" if (!= $data.home.thoroughlySearched true): jump home_shack_thorough_search "[Check the hidden compartment]" if (&& $data.home.foundCompartment (!= $data.home.checkedCompartment true)): jump home_shack_compartment // IMPLANT INTERACTION "[Focus on your implant]" if (>= $data.skills.hacker 2): jump home_shack_implant_focus // VOICE CONVERSATIONS "[Talk to the voices in your head]" if (!= $data.home.talkedToVoices true): jump home_shack_voices "[Leave] [[BACK TO MAP]]": jump game_map // ==================== REST SEQUENCES ==================== home_shack_rest: clear_dialog "You lie down on the thin mattress. Your body aches. Your mind races. But exhaustion wins." clear_dialog play sound sleep wait 2000 "..." clear_dialog "You dream of falling. Of code scrolling endlessly. Of a woman's voice calling your name." clear_dialog "You wake with a start. The dream fades, but the feeling remains." clear_dialog if (roll rest_dream ancestor 30): talk ancestor internal "Dreams are messages from the deeper self. Remember the falling. Remember the code. They mean something." set data.player.dreamsRecovered (+ $data.player.dreamsRecovered 1) jump home_shack_main home_shack_deep_rest: clear_dialog "You need proper sleep. Real rest. You settle in for the night." clear_dialog play sound sleep wait 3000 "The darkness takes you." clear_dialog "..." clear_dialog // Deeper dream sequence "You stand in a room of white. Sterile. Clinical. People in lab coats move around you." clear_dialog "One of them turns. You see your own face, but older. Scarred." clear_dialog "\"You did this to yourself,\" the face says. \"Remember that.\"" clear_dialog "You wake gasping. The shack is dark. Your implant throbs." clear_dialog set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) talk hacker internal "A laboratory. Experiments. And someone who looks like us. This is important." talk survivor internal "This is dangerous. Someone's been in our head. Literally." jump home_shack_main // ==================== MEDITATION/MEMORY ==================== home_shack_meditate: clear_dialog "You sit in the center of the shack, close your eyes, and turn inward." clear_dialog "The implant's damaged architecture looms in your mind's eye—a labyrinth of corrupted data and locked memories." clear_dialog if (roll memory_meditation ancestor 40): "You find a crack in the walls. A fragment of memory..." clear_dialog // Random memory fragment set data.meditation.memoryType (random 1 3) if (== $data.meditation.memoryType 1): "You see a young man's face. Dark skin, bright eyes, a smile that makes your heart ache. He says something you can't hear. Then he's gone." talk ancestor internal "Love. You loved someone. Remember that feeling. It will guide you back to yourself." set data.home.rememberedLove true elseif (== $data.meditation.memoryType 2): "You see lines of code. Elegant. Beautiful. Your fingers moving across a keyboard, building something important. A message? A weapon? You can't tell." talk hacker internal "We created something. Something powerful. We need to find out what." set data.home.rememberedCreation true else: "You see a building. Glass and steel rising above the township. A corporate logo you almost recognize. You're running toward it. Or away from it." talk survivor internal "The corps. The enemy. We were fighting them. We need to find out why." set data.home.rememberedEnemy true set data.player.memoriesRecovered (+ $data.player.memoriesRecovered 1) else: "The walls are too thick. The corruption too deep. You surface with nothing but a headache." talk survivor internal "Don't push too hard. You'll burn out what's left of your mind." jump home_shack_main // ==================== INVENTORY ==================== home_shack_inventory: clear_dialog "You take stock of what you have:" clear_dialog if (has_item? neural_deck): "- A neural deck (essential for hacking)" if (has_item? credchip): "- A credchip with $data.inventory.credits credits" if (has_item? shiv): "- A shiv (better than nothing in a fight)" if (has_item? data_chip): "- A mysterious data chip (contents unknown)" if (has_item? ice_breaker): "- ICE Breaker software (hacking bonus)" if (has_item? stims): "- Stim patches (emergency healing)" if (&& (!= (has_item? neural_deck) true) (!= $data.home.deckFound true)): "You notice something under the mattress..." choice: "[Investigate]": jump home_shack_find_deck "[Ignore it for now]": jump home_shack_main jump home_shack_main home_shack_find_deck: set data.home.deckFound true add_item neural_deck 1 "You pull out a battered neural deck. Old model, but functional. Your fingers know its weight." clear_dialog talk hacker internal "Yes. This is ours. This is how we fight back." jump home_shack_main // ==================== PHOTOGRAPH ==================== home_shack_photo: set data.home.examinedPhoto true clear_dialog "You take down the photograph and study it carefully." clear_dialog "The woman is beautiful in the way that mothers are beautiful—worn, resilient, full of love she hasn't been paid for." clear_dialog "Her clothes mark her as West African. Nigerian, maybe, or Ghanaian. The bright patterns contrast with the gray walls of your shack." clear_dialog "On the back, someone has written in faded ink: \"My Amina. Forever in my heart.\"" clear_dialog "Amina. The name echoes in your mind." clear_dialog choice: "What do you feel?" "[Love] - This woman loved you. You loved her.": if (roll photo_love ancestor 50): "A memory surfaces: Amina's hands braiding your hair. Her voice singing a lullaby in a language you don't speak. The smell of her perfume." talk ancestor internal "Your mother. Or the woman who raised you. Her love is still with you, even if she isn't." add_level ancestor 1 set data.home.knowMother true else: "You feel the shape of the love, but not its substance. Like a book you once read but can't remember." "[Loss] - She's gone. Someone took her from you.": if (roll photo_loss survivor 50): "A flash of grief so sharp it doubles you over. A funeral. A coffin. A face you hate but can't place." talk survivor internal "Someone hurt her. Someone hurt you. We need to find out who. Make them pay." set data.home.knowLoss true else: "The loss is there, but its source is hidden. Locked away with everything else." "[Nothing] - The photograph means nothing to you.": talk hacker internal "The connection is there. The data is just corrupted. We need more time." jump home_shack_main // ==================== THOROUGH SEARCH ==================== home_shack_thorough_search: set data.home.thoroughlySearched true clear_dialog run spend_hours 1 "You tear the shack apart, looking for anything that might tell you who you are." clear_dialog // Hidden compartment discovery if (roll search_hidden survivor 40): "Your fingers find a loose floorboard. Underneath, a hidden compartment." set data.home.foundCompartment true talk survivor internal "Smart. We were hiding things. Preparing for something." // Random discoveries if (roll search_items survivor 50): "In a crack in the wall, you find a credchip with 25 credits." add data.inventory.credits 25 if (roll search_notes hacker 40): "Scrawled on a scrap of paper, barely legible: \"SILAS KNOWS. FIND HIM.\"" set data.quests.knowAboutSilas true talk hacker internal "Silas. Someone who has answers. We need to find him." if (roll search_map survivor 30): "A hand-drawn map of the wine farms, with one building circled in red." add_item wine_farm_map 1 talk survivor internal "Something happened at those farms. Something important enough to map out." "You've searched thoroughly. There's nothing else to find." jump home_shack_main // ==================== HIDDEN COMPARTMENT ==================== home_shack_compartment: set data.home.checkedCompartment true clear_dialog "You lift the floorboard and reveal a small cache hidden beneath." clear_dialog // Contents based on what's been discovered "Inside you find:" clear_dialog "- A credchip with 50 credits" add data.inventory.credits 50 "- A shiv, sharp and well-maintained" add_item shiv 1 "- A data chip, label worn away" add_item data_chip 1 "- A photograph, different from the one on the wall" add_item secret_photo 1 "The photograph shows you—you recognize your own face—standing with three other people. A young woman with cybernetic arms. An older man with graying hair. A teenager with a nervous smile." clear_dialog "On the back: \"The Collective. We fight together.\"" clear_dialog talk hacker internal "The Netrunner Collective. These were our people. Our team. We need to find them." talk survivor internal "If they're still alive. If they haven't been captured or killed." talk ancestor internal "Family isn't always blood. These people chose to fight alongside us. Remember that." set data.quests.foundCollectivePhoto true jump home_shack_main // ==================== IMPLANT FOCUS ==================== home_shack_implant_focus: clear_dialog "You close your eyes and sink into the architecture of your own mind." clear_dialog "The implant is a city of corrupted data—buildings crumbling, streets blocked, files scattered like debris after a storm." clear_dialog choice: "Where do you focus?"
